ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavior_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "frame_number" INTEGER /* Frame number in the video or data stream */,
  "time_seconds" REAL /* Time in seconds corresponding to the frame */,
  "rightpaw_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the right paw */,
  "rightpaw_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the right paw */,
  "leftpaw_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the left paw */,
  "leftpaw_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the left paw */,
  "tailbase_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the tail base */,
  "tailbase_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the tail base */,
  "rotarodtop_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the top of the rotarod */,
  "rotarodtop_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the top of the rotarod */,
  "rotarodbottom_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the bottom of the rotarod */,
  "rotarodbottom_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the bottom of the rotarod */,
  "rightpaw_euclidean_velocity" REAL /* Euclidean velocity of the right paw */,
  "leftpaw_euclidean_velocity" REAL /* Euclidean velocity of the left paw */,
  "step_up" INTEGER /* Indicator of stepping up action */,
  "wait_time_b4_step_up" REAL /* Wait time before stepping up */,
  "clustering" INTEGER /* Cluster number for behavioral categorization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the collector of the data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_data_clustering FOREIGN KEY ("clustering") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_data_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavior_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt for password hashing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_details" TEXT /* Details of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the experiment file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "upload_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the uploader of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_files_upload_by FOREIGN KEY ("upload_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the behavior cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the behavior cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the condition belongs to */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter name */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the research group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the research group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research group the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the group (e.g., leader, member) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES research_groups ("group_id")
)
